## Summary

- Describe the behavior or harness change in 1-3 bullets.

## Verification

- [ ] Added or updated tests for the changed behavior
- [ ] Ran the relevant local verification commands
- [ ] Ran `uv run python -m ptsm.bootstrap harness-check --base-ref origin/main`

## Docs

- [ ] Updated the related source-of-truth docs or runbooks in the same PR
- [ ] Ran `uv run python -m ptsm.bootstrap docs-sync --base-ref origin/main` locally, or explained why not
- [ ] Bumped `last_verified` on any touched active source-of-truth doc
